Hero.homeDescription: A 22 year old Full-Stack Developer based in Amsterdam, the Netherlands. Student {'@'} {hva}. Currently focused on growing as a all-round developer, building projects that combine my knowledge of UX and Frontend Development.

About.title: About me
About.subtitle: My introduction
About.description: I'm a 3rd year Software Engineering student at {hva}. Previously worked as a Frontend Engineer at SaaS startup {altura}, where I helped improve the workflow of bid managers and improved the usability of key parts of the platform, including through my internship research into error handling in the application. I enjoy turning ideas into functional digital products that are both user-friendly and visually appealing. I'm currently doing my minor in Visual Interface Design, where I focus on interaction design, visual design and usability.
